# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: 2021-02-01
    name: publicIP1
    location: [parameters('location')]
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
      
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: 2021-02-01
    name: publicIP2
    location: [parameters('location')]
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: 2021-02-01
    name: nic1
    location: [parameters('location')]
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', 'publicIP1')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: 2021-02-01
    name: nic2
    location: [parameters('location')]
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig2
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', 'publicIP2')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: 2021-03-01
    name: vm1
    location: [parameters('location')]
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS1_v2
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: 'MicrosoftWindowsServer'
          offer: 'WindowsServer'
          sku: '2019-Datacenter'
          version: 'latest'
        osDisk:
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: StandardSSD_LRS
      osProfile:
        computerName: vm1
        adminUsername: [parameters('adminUsername')]
        adminPassword: [parameters('adminPassword')]
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'nic1')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: 2021-03-01
    name: vm2
    location: [parameters('location')]
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS1_v2
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: 'MicrosoftWindowsServer'
          offer: 'WindowsServer'
          sku: '2019-Datacenter'
          version: 'latest'
        osDisk:
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: StandardSSD_LRS
      osProfile:
        computerName: vm2
        adminUsername: [parameters('adminUsername')]
        adminPassword: [parameters('adminPassword')]
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', 'nic2')]"  

parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: eastus
  adminUsername:
    type: string
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
